name: Yantis
description_short: Yantis Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, NCUA-insured credit union serving Hopkins, Rains, and Wood Counties in Texas since 1955, offering savings accounts, loans, and digital banking.
description_long:
Yantis Federal Credit Union was founded in August 1955 by H.E. Coker and Yantis residents who believed in the principle of "people helping people." The credit union has operated as a community-chartered financial cooperative for nearly 70 years, rooted in Yantis, Texas, and has recently expanded its service area to include Hopkins, Rains, and Wood Counties. The institution is insured by the National Credit Union Share Insurance Fund (NCUSIF), with member deposits protected up to at least $250,000 by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government.

Yantis FCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including share savings and checking accounts, certificates of deposit, home and auto loans, boat loans, agricultural equipment loans, and real estate financing. Members have access to modern digital banking tools including home banking portals, mobile apps (Card Suite Lite app), Apple Pay integration, remote deposit capture, and bill pay services (Flex Pay). The credit union also provides ATM access, debit cards, and direct deposit/deduction capabilities for convenient account management.

Yantis FCU distinguishes itself through its tight community ties, board-led governance structure, and membership in America's Credit Unions (Credit Union National Association). The institution actively promotes member education and transparency, with prominently displayed fraud warnings and a dedicated after-hours debit card fraud line (888-263-3370). They are positioned as an Equal Housing Lender operating in compliance with federal fair lending laws, demonstrating commitment to inclusive financial services.

The main limitations are geographic: the credit union serves only a specific region of Northeast Texas and operates limited hours (Monday-Friday, 8:30am-4pm). As a smaller institution, their product offerings and technology infrastructure may lag larger national credit unions. However, for eligible residents in their service area seeking personalized, community-focused credit union membership, Yantis FCU provides solid fundamentals with NCUA insurance protection and competitive lending rates (currently advertising 7% for approved auto loans).
services: Home and auto loans (new and used)
pros: NCUA-insured deposits with full federal backing up to $250,000
Currently offering 7% APR auto loans for approved members
Modern mobile banking with Card Suite Lite app and Apple Pay integration
Remote deposit capture and bill pay (Flex Pay) for convenience
Community-focused credit union with 70-year history and local board governance
Recently expanded service area to Hopkins, Rains, and Wood Counties
Dedicated 24/7 after-hours debit card fraud line (888-263-3370)
cons: Limited service hours (Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm only, no weekend hours)
Geographic restriction to Northeast Texas; not available nationwide
Limited online presence with minimal detail about membership eligibility or rates on website
Smaller institution with fewer resources and technology options compared to national credit unions
No information provided about membership fees, minimum balances, or loan approval requirements
best_for: Residents of Hopkins, Rains, and Wood Counties in Northeast Texas seeking community-focused banking
Members who prioritize NCUA insurance protection and local credit union governance
Borrowers with good credit seeking competitive auto loan rates in their service area
Rural and semi-rural customers valuing personalized service over digital-only banking
diagnosis: Yantis FCU is best for residents in its service area (Hopkins, Rains, and Wood Counties, Texas) who value community-based, NCUA-insured credit union membership with competitive lending rates. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this is not available outside Northeast Texas—and restricted operating hours that may not suit customers needing weekend or evening access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
